[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: Overview: A dark-themed “LEVEL UP!” game interface screen shows a circular profile area and progress statistics for a user named “yan nonchalant.”

Main Subject: The central focus is a rectangular panel displaying level progress information, including a large circular avatar on the left and multiple progress/stat boxes and labels across the middle and right.

Setting: The scene is entirely a digital UI layout on a dark, gradient background with no visible real-world environment; it appears like a game or app progress screen.

Visual Details: At the very top center, the text “LEVEL UP!” is shown in bright yellow with small decorative diamond shapes on both sides. The main panel has rounded corners and a subtle outline, with a dark navy-to-purple gradient background. On the left side, a circular area contains a mostly white silhouette-like shape on a light gray background, with a purple ring border around the circle and a darker purple accent at the top-left portion of the ring. In the center, there are two rounded rectangles: one labeled “LEVEL 2” and another labeled “EXPERIENCE 4 / 150” with a teal/green background. Below these is a horizontal progress bar with a small purple segment at the left end and the rest appearing as a dark bar. On the right side of the progress bar is the number “2%” in light text. Under the bar are three smaller rounded boxes labeled “MESSAGES 26,” “XP NEEDED 146,” and “NEXT LVL 3,” each with distinct dark backgrounds. At the bottom center of the panel, faint text reads “Congratulations on leveling up!” The camera angle is straight-on, and the composition is centered with consistent spacing and rounded UI elements.

Visible Text: LEVEL UP!
yan nonchalant
#7
LEVEL PROGRESS
LEVEL 2
EXPERIENCE
4 / 150
2%
MESSAGES
26
XP NEEDED
146
NEXT LVL
3
Congratulations on leveling up!

Practical Summary: The image shows a level-up progress dashboard with a profile circle and several stats. It displays the current level, experience progress, percentage completion, and next level information within a dark, stylized UI panel.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
